headline: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release dominates the cycle, from Cyril Imhof's coverage to Anthropic's own capability demos.
body: Cyril Imhof leads the recommended channels on the Fable 5 launch, positioning it as separate from Opus, foregrounding a Know Your Agent (KYA) feature [0] and reviewing its fit for regulated industries alongside context engineering and design patterns for long-running agents [1]. Chase AI frames Fable 5 as part of the Mythos 5 family, with Fable 5 being Mythos 5 plus guardrails, offered at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22 before usage credits apply [7][10]. Anthropic's own demos show Fable 5 autonomously building a factory in Factorio [11], deriving planetary orbits from first principles to predict a solar eclipse [12], and generating both a fluid simulation and a Beethoven EDM remix in code [13]. Better Stack diverges with developer tooling, covering the self-hosted NotebookLM alternative Open Notebook with API access [2], Claude for code generation [3], and an Instagram AI access exploit [4].
